hooks.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | tail -10; fi
files=$(git diff --name-only -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.cjs' '*.js' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$files" ]; then grep -Hn 'throw new \|TODO\|FIXME\|console\.log' $files 2>/dev/null | head -5; fi

vm_files=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(apps/back/app|products/[^/]+/app)/.+\.(js|ts)$' | grep -v '\.test\.'); if [ -n "$vm_files" ]; then violations=$(grep -Hn 'require(\|^import \|module\.exports\|process\.env\|process\.cwd\|fs\.readFile\|fs\.writeFile\|new Date()\|Date\.now()\|Math\.random()' $vm_files 2>/dev/null | head -10); if [ -n "$violations" ]; then echo 'WARNING: VM-sandbox violation in app/ — require/import/module.exports/process/fs/Date/Math.random are FORBIDDEN. Use injected deps (config, lib, domain, console, errors) and clock/prng:'; echo "$violations"; fi; fi

fe_files=$(git diff --name-only -- 'apps/frontend/**/*.tsx' 'apps/frontend/**/*.ts' 'packages/{ui,hooks,api-client,auth}/**/*.tsx' 'packages/{ui,hooks,api-client,auth}/**/*.ts' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$fe_files" ]; then fakes=$(grep -Hn 'Math\.random\|setInterval.*=>.*v\s*+\|: any\b\|@ts-ignore\|@ts-expect-error' $fe_files 2>/dev/null | head -10); if [ -n "$fakes" ]; then echo 'WARNING: frontend Real Data / strict-TS violation — Math.random in render, fake setInterval ticker, any, @ts-ignore are FORBIDDEN:'; echo "$fakes"; fi; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if [ -f package.json ]; then pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.rs$|Cargo\.(toml|lock)$'; then echo '--- cargo build --workspace ---'; cargo build --workspace --quiet 2>&1 | tail -10; fi; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); MSG=$(cat .git/COMMIT_EDITMSG 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$STAGED" | grep -q '^docs/tech-debt\.md$'; then if echo "$MSG" | grep -qE '^reviewer:|Co-Authored-By:.*reviewer'; then :; elif echo "$MSG" | grep -qF '[tech-debt: fill-test-column]'; then :; else echo 'BLOCKED: docs/tech-debt.md authored without authorisation. Reviewer adds new TDs via `reviewer:` commit prefix or `Co-Authored-By: reviewer` trailer. Architect fills «Тест на fix» column with `[tech-debt: fill-test-column]` marker in commit message. See scope-guard.md.'; exit 1; fi; fi; if echo "$STAGED" | grep -qE '^(\.claude/|CLAUDE\.md$|docs/project-state|docs/sprints/|docs/feature-areas/|docs/NOUS_Strategy_v5|docs/NOUS_Development_Roadmap|docs/architecture\.md$|docs/roadmap\.md$)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: constitutional documents staged — only architect/reviewer may commit these'; exit 1; fi; fi
echo 'Session ended. Run: git log --oneline -5 && (test -f package.json && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test -- --run || echo no package.json yet)'
